import pandas as pd


def export_to_api(df, endpoint):
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        record = row.to_dict()
        send_record(endpoint, record)


def batch_process(df):
    for idx in range(len(df)):
        row_dict = df.iloc[idx].to_dict()
        process_row(row_dict)


def serialize_rows(df):
    results = []
    for i in range(len(df)):
        data = df.iloc[i].to_dict()
        results.append(data)
    return results


def send_record(endpoint, record):
    pass


def process_row(row_dict):
    pass
